_comment: Calipokehouse shift schedule. Times are 24-hour, Pacific Time. Each shift's 'message_key' references a message group in messages.json.

_schedule_summary.monday_to_thursday: Two separate streams per day. Shift 1: 1pm-11pm. Shift 2: 11pm-10am overnight.
_schedule_summary.thursday_evening_to_monday_morning: Continuous stream. Shift 1: 1pm-12am. Shift 2: 12am-12pm Fri/Sat/Sun, 11:40pm-11am Sun-into-Mon.
_schedule_summary.encoding_note: Overnight shifts are stored under the calendar day they START on. So 'Apollo & Ahnist's Thursday night shift' (which actually runs Fri 12am-12pm) is stored under 'friday'.
